description: Refused. One card in corpus, vision-only, ip_verified false. Mr. Nodeley threshold is 3+ cards sharing a concept (Bolas-cluster precedent: Despark + Topple + Prison Realm). Single-card solo-pair character nodes are not standard. Wait for triviabot to flip ip_verified true (which will lock the canonical SwSh post-game antagonist-pair identity with citations) AND a second print to land OR a thematically adjacent card to materialize (e.g. Rose / Oleana / Macro Cosmos cards from same post-game arc). Re-evaluate then. Holding the line on threshold rigor; one Supporter card does not yet support a node.
citations: [Bolas-cluster precedent: nicol-bolas.md created from 3 cards, Despark + Topple to the Pile + Prison Realm]
